title: Uruguayan Italian Casserole
description: A flavorful and filling casserole that combines the best of Italian and Uruguayan cuisine. This hearty dish is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Roll out the buttery flaky pastry and place it in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Spread the pre-cooked Uruguayan one pot casserole evenly over the pastry.
Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese, and chopped fresh basil over the casserole.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
